meta.defaultDescription: ClosersMatch — The platform for high-ticket sales. We connect companies with certified closers and appointment setters.

footer.tagline: The platform for high-ticket sales, for companies and closers.

cookies.bannerBody: We use cookies to keep ClosersMatch running smoothly, understand what actually helps visitors like you, and show you relevant information instead of random ads. Choose what works for you — you can always change your mind later.
cookies.modalBody: Choose which types of cookies you want to allow. The more you allow, the better we can tailor the site and our communication to you. Essential cookies are always on, as the website cannot function properly without them.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function, such as remembering your language preference and cookie settings. They cannot be disabled.

functional.label: Preferences
functional.description: These cookies remember your preferences and settings, making your visit more personal and user-friendly.

analytics.label: Statistics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website, including via Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity, so we can improve the site.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies are used to show relevant ads and measure the effectiveness of our campaigns, including via Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), and Leadinfo.
